subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath turned towards Him and attained unto the knowledge of God, on a day wherein the divines have turned aside and through their verdict so too the rulers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل و فاز بعرفان الله فی یوم فیه اعرض العلماء و بفتوئهم الامرآء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for spiritual recognition
